# Althor Consulting

> Production infrastructure for AI agent systems.
> The guardrails, orchestration, and audit between a prompt and a production deployment.

Althor Consulting LLC is a solo consulting practice (Maryland, US) specializing in the infrastructure that makes agent deployments ship — credential brokers, tool access layers, approval gating, audit trails, and MCP integration for enterprise teams.

## Focus areas

- Production infrastructure for AI agent systems
- Model Context Protocol (MCP) server design and deployment
- Credential brokering for agent tool access
- Policy-gated approval flows for critical actions
- Audit and observability for agent-driven workflows
- Salesforce and CRM workflow automation with agent handlers
- Production ops for internal AI platforms — LiteLLM, Langfuse, vLLM
- Security and audit posture review for agent-driven workflows

## Engagements

- Discovery (1–2 weeks, fixed-scope) — architecture and security review of an existing or planned agent deployment.
- Build (8–12 weeks, fixed-scope) — end-to-end build of an agent system: identity, credential broker, scoped tools, policy gating, audit layer.
- Advisory (monthly retainer) — ongoing architecture review, design partnership, and escalation on tricky calls.

Remote-first.

## Case studies

- Multi-model extraction pipeline — https://althor.dev/work/extraction-pipeline/
- Enterprise AI governance platform — https://althor.dev/work/governance-platform/
- Spire (AI infrastructure control plane) — https://althor.dev/work/spire/

## Writing

- Adding MCP servers to Copilot Studio in regulated environments — https://althor.dev/writing/mcp-copilot-studio/
- Making agent deployments pass security review — https://althor.dev/writing/agent-security-review/
- Drawing the right boundaries for an MCP server — https://althor.dev/writing/mcp-server-boundaries/
